mapper.select:
select o.orderType, m.name AS member, o.orderDate, s.name as setmeal from t_order o ,t_setmeal s ,t_member m
o.member_id = m.id AND o.setmeal_id = s.id and o.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into t_order(member_id, orderDate, orderType, orderStatus, setmeal_id) values (#{memberId}, #{orderDate}, #{orderType}, #{orderStatus}, #{setmealId})
